notes: Silent-ignore now at ~3.42 days past window close. Analyst handoff: confirm that uncounted-failures.json already reflects PRED-105 silent_ignore (added around 48-72h threshold in prior polls). The dome author has now produced zero manual commits for ~94 hours (from a57e731 on 2026-04-17T12:02Z to this poll). Counterargument to keep on record: absence of adjudication is still consistent with 'experiment-not-yet-performed-or-reported' rather than deliberate failure-hiding. Opposing consideration: (a) the 14-day window already budgets the full growth interval, and 82h past close is well outside any post-hoc data-collection delay plausible for a 14-day cucumber-growth protocol; (b) the author continues regenerating daily_review.json (latest 2026-04-21T07:06:10Z) with registry_ratio_pct=94.5 — i.e., the accounting pipeline runs but omits PRED-105; (c) predictions.html byte-identity across 4 polls rules out edit-and-revert churn. Next-poll escalation watch unchanged: (1) goalpost-move → CRITICAL, (2) WIN-070 with PRED-105 claim → CRITICAL hard-escalation, (3) first manual commit would be substantive minimum and must be diffed for canary/parameter changes.
